projects.Title: Volume By Speed
projects.Subtitle: Andriod Mobile App
projects.AdditionalLinkMessage: View on the Google Play Store
projects.Brief: Volume by Speed is an Android Mobile App that will adjust the volume of the device relative to the speed it’s moving at. This technology is often found in newer cars to counteract road noise that takes away from the audio experience. My app makes this technology accessible and can be used in a variety of similar situations (ie. cycling, skiing, running).
projects.Description:
Volume by Speed is an Android Mobile App that will adjust the volume of the device relative to the speed it’s moving at. This technology is often found in newer cars to counteract road noise that takes away from the audio experience. My app makes this technology accessible and can be used in a variety of similar situations (ie. cycling, skiing, running).
This project came early in my career, and because of its success, it inspired me to continue my software career at San Diego State University. This full-stack project involved creating an intuitive frontend using the tools provided by Android Studio, a back end that accessed location services and adjusted the device’s volume from the background, and connected to Googles ad service to create revenue.
I started working on Volume by Speed in March 2021, and after nearly a year of development, I published it to the Google Play Store in January 2022. Since its launch, the app has undergone several updates and iterations to fix bugs, introduce new features, and enhance the user experience. The latest release (version 7, 1.2.2) was rolled out in May 2023, and no additional updates are currently planned. As of October 2024, Volume by Speed holds a 4.2-star rating with over 50 reviews. While the majority of feedback has been positive, highlighting the app’s usefulness, there have been several constructive criticisms pointing out areas for improvement. I’ve also received close to a dozen direct emails from users requesting new features or offering suggestions, which has been both helpful and motivating in refining the app further. User feedback has played a crucial role in driving improvements, and it’s been gratifying to see the app resonate with others.
Volume by Speed was the largest project I had taken on up to that point, resulting in countless ‘learn by doing’ moments. As a solo developer, I relied heavily on online resources, which made the development process slower but deeply educational. This project has been a cornerstone of my journey in software engineering and computer science. It was the first major app I built entirely on my own, from concept to completion. Having a finished product that I, and others, find genuinely useful is incredibly rewarding. This project represents my growth as a developer and serves as a tangible example of my passion for creating meaningful software.

projects.Title: Photo Sort
projects.Subtitle: Python App
projects.Brief: Photosort is a Python script to aid in sorting massive amounts of media.
projects.Description: Photosort is a Python script to aid in sorting massive amounts of media. The script will deconstruct file trees, then reconstruct a file tree, placing files in directories based on their timestamp and location data.
